title: Shift the Load demo assumptions
disclaimer: Educational fallback assumptions for approximate flexible electricity use. Replace these values with ADEME ElecDom-derived values when the source file is available in the project.
source_notes: ADEME ElecDom open data was requested for appliance consumption, but no source file is bundled with this repository.
Values are approximate per-household event energy assumptions for an offline public demo, not measured household savings.
EV charging and heating reduction are placeholders and are explicitly labelled as such in the app.

actions.label: Washing machine
actions.source_detail: Approximate electricity for one typical wash cycle; replace with ADEME ElecDom when available.

actions.label: Dishwasher
actions.source_detail: Approximate electricity for one dishwasher cycle; replace with ADEME ElecDom when available.

actions.label: Oven
actions.source_detail: Approximate electricity for one cooking event; ovens vary widely by model and use.

actions.label: EV charging
actions.source_detail: Demo placeholder for a small home charging session. Not ADEME ElecDom-derived.

actions.label: Heating reduction
actions.source_detail: Demo placeholder for a temporary one-hour electric heating reduction with comfort-preserving rebound later.
